description_long: This is a modern two-story house set within a rectangular fenced lot, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, allowing for ample natural light. The property includes a front yard with manicured grass, several trees, and a driveway leading to a garage. The backyard is landscaped with tall, slender trees, a patio area, and what appears to be a circular pool or water feature. The house is surrounded by a gray fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary. Architectural details include a prominent entryway, a mix of open and enclosed outdoor spaces, and a blend of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards, enclosed by a gray fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and manicured front yard with trees and a fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a clear view of the backyard landscaping and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with tall trees, patio, and circular pool, as well as the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, patio, pool, and the side of the house with additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front door with steps, minimal overhang, and a paved path leading from the gate through the front yard.
